visa_types.name: Employment
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Study]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee can be paid in cash or card.
VFS Service charge:
Along with the visa fees, there is a service charge of INR 1026/- (All VFS’s service charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @ 9% and CGST@ 9%)) is applicable per visa application and is mandatory to make payment online at the time of booking appointment. For Appeal cases, service charge is applicable.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- The service fee is non-refundable once the appointment is confirmed.
- Applicants will be eligible for rescheduling their confirmed appointment once to another date if slots are available online.
- There is an optional courier facility available at Rs. 960/- (Inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) per application / passport.
- Courier after submission - INR 960
- (Description- If you had not opted for the Courier service on the day of your application submission, you could still choose this service after the submission. Simply send an email to our Customer Care team at vasinfo@vfshelpline.com (mailto:vasinfo@vfshelpline.com) and pay the required fees online.)
- Please note: Emails will be responded to Monday through Friday during business hours and the payment link will remain valid for 24 hours for payment initiation.
visa_types.processing_time:
Processing time is 15 calendar days and it will start from the submission of the application at the Embassy/ Consulate.
In some cases, the processing time may be prolonged to 45 days.
Kindly note if application is submitted in Satellite centre, it may take up to 48-72 hours in transit to New Delhi/Mumbai. All the applications received from Satellite centers will be sent to Embassy/Consulate on next working day.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
General Information:
VISA type-D can be provided for people who are planning to stay  on the Polish territory more than 90 days in total (one or more visits) during  a year starting from the day of the first entry.
Long-term VISA type-D gives a right:
- to       stay on the Polish territory till the expiration date of VISA;
- to move on the territory  of the other countries-members of the Schengen Agreement not more than 90 days  during every 180-day period starting from the day of the first entry.
- important information-
All applicants applying for National Employment and study, would receive their appointment confirmation from the Embassy after following the process as listed on their official website (D-Type national visa - work - Poland in India - Gov.pl website (https://www.gov.pl/web/india/d-type-national-visa---work) and D-Type national visa - study - Poland in India - Gov.pl website (https://www.gov.pl/web/india/d-type-national-visa---study2)) 
Once the applicants receive confirmation of their slot allocation by The Embassy, all these applicants are required to fill up a visa application form (E-form) as a part of submission process. This is a mandatory document and needs to be filled up before visiting the visa application centre in VFS. Please visit the below official portal of VFS to fill up the form here: https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login (https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
General Information:
VISA type-D can be provided for people who are planning to stay  on the Polish territory more than 90 days in total (one or more visits) during  a year starting from the day of the first entry.
Long-term VISA type-D gives a right:
- to       stay on the Polish territory till the expiration date of VISA;
- to move on the territory  of the other countries-members of the Schengen Agreement not more than 90 days  during every 180-day period starting from the day of the first entry.
- important information-
All applicants applying for National Employment and study, would receive their appointment confirmation from the Embassy after following the process as listed on their official website (D-Type national visa - work - Poland in India - Gov.pl website (https://www.gov.pl/web/india/d-type-national-visa---work) and D-Type national visa - study - Poland in India - Gov.pl website (https://www.gov.pl/web/india/d-type-national-visa---study2)) 
Once the applicants receive confirmation of their slot allocation by The Embassy, all these applicants are required to fill up a visa application form (E-form) as a part of submission process. This is a mandatory document and needs to be filled up before visiting the visa application centre in VFS. Please visit the below official portal of VFS to fill up the form here: https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login (https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login)

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Study]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee can be paid in cash or card.
VFS Service charge:
Along with the visa fees, there is a service charge of INR 1026/- (All VFS’s service charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @ 9% and CGST@ 9%)) is applicable per visa application and is mandatory to make payment online at the time of booking appointment. For Appeal cases, service charge is applicable.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- The service fee is non-refundable once the appointment is confirmed.
- Applicants will be eligible for rescheduling their confirmed appointment once to another date if slots are available online.
- There is an optional courier facility available at Rs. 960/- (Inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) per application / passport.
- Courier after submission - INR 960
- (Description- If you had not opted for the Courier service on the day of your application submission, you could still choose this service after the submission. Simply send an email to our Customer Care team at vasinfo@vfshelpline.com (mailto:vasinfo@vfshelpline.com) and pay the required fees online.)
- Please note: Emails will be responded to Monday through Friday during business hours and the payment link will remain valid for 24 hours for payment initiation.

## Documents Required
Documents checklist

## Photo Specifications
Note: We  regret we cannot accept photographs that do not meet these requirements
Please provide one recent photograph (not more than 6 months  old) of yourself, which should not have been used previously in the passport.  The photograph should be in colour and:
- Taken against a light  background (white or off-white) so that features are distinguishable and  contrast against the background.
- Clear share quality and  with the face in focus.
- Printed on normal  photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling  [without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the applicant  wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background]
- Please stick the  Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note: Please  follow these instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these  requirements your application will be considered incomplete. A photo booth  meeting these requirements is available at the centre.

## Processing Time
Processing time is 15 calendar days and it will start from the submission of the application at the Embassy/ Consulate.
In some cases, the processing time may be prolonged to 45 days.
Kindly note if application is submitted in Satellite centre, it may take up to 48-72 hours in transit to New Delhi/Mumbai. All the applications received from Satellite centers will be sent to Embassy/Consulate on next working day.

## Application Form

National Visa Form (https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login)
Note - The applicant has to carry the downloaded filled form while visiting the centre for submission as a mandatory requirement.

IMPORTANT NOTE: You are requested to fill-up your online visa application form maximum 5 days prior to your scheduled appointment.

visa_types.name: Tourist Visit
visa_types.documents_required:
Documents checklist
Important update for applicants applying for a Schengen visa.
Applicants who apply for a Schengen visa must visit the respective Visa Application Center in person and submit visa 
application by themselves along with biometric data (fingerprints).
Submission of visa application through travel agents is not allowed. At the moment of visa application 
submission, employees of Visa Application Center collect fingerprints from applicants who are 12 years 
old and above. Applicants, who state that they have already provided fingerprints earlier but do not 
have the respective mark “VIS” on previous Schengen visa in their passport, will be obliged to submit
 fingerprints at Visa Application Center.
Please note: Kotak General Insurance has officially changed its name to Zurich Kotak General Insurance Company (India) following the JV agreement sign-off.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Tourist Visit]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee can be paid in cash or card.
VFS Service charge:
Along with the visa fees, there is a service charge of INR 1026/- (All VFS’s service charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @ 9% and CGST@ 9%)) is applicable per visa application and is mandatory to make payment online at the time of booking appointment. For Appeal cases, service charge is applicable.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- The service fee is non-refundable once the appointment is confirmed.
- Applicants will be eligible for rescheduling their confirmed appointment once to another date if slots are available online.
- There is an optional courier facility available at Rs. 960/- (Inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) per application / passport.
- Courier after submission - INR 960
- (Description- If you had not opted for the Courier service on the day of your application submission, you could still choose this service after the submission. Simply send an email to our Customer Care team at vasinfo@vfshelpline.com (mailto:vasinfo@vfshelpline.com) and pay the required fees online.)
- Please note: Emails will be responded to Monday through Friday during business hours and the payment link will remain valid for 24 hours for payment initiation.
The Schengen visa fee is waived for applicants belonging to one of the following categories:
- children under six years;
- school pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research as defined in Recommendation No 2005/761/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council of 28 September 2005 to facilitate the issue by the Member States of uniform short-stay visas for researchers from third countries travelling within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research;
- representatives of non-profit organisations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organised by non-profit organizations;
- family members of the citizens of the European Union (as well as Switzerland and EFTA countries).
- the procedure only applies to EU citizens who move to or reside in another EU Member State than the one of which they are nationals, and it applies to their family members who accompany or join them. This procedure applies only to family members of EU nationals who do not have Polish citizenship or do not have a permanent residence in Poland
 
(https://www.gov.pl/web/india/visas---general-information) (https://www.gov.pl/web/india/visas---general-information)

- Applicants will be eligible for rescheduling their confirmed appointment once to another date if slots are available online.
- There is an optional courier facility available at Rs. 960/- (Inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) per application / passport.
- Courier after submission - INR 960
- (Description- If you had not opted for the Courier service on the day of your application submission, you could still choose this service after the submission. Simply send an email to our Customer Care team at vasinfo@vfshelpline.com (mailto:vasinfo@vfshelpline.com) and pay the required fees online.)
- Please note: Emails will be responded to Monday through Friday during business hours and the payment link will remain valid for 24 hours for payment initiation.
The Schengen visa fee is waived for applicants belonging to one of the following categories:
- children under six years;
- school pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research as defined in Recommendation No 2005/761/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council of 28 September 2005 to facilitate the issue by the Member States of uniform short-stay visas for researchers from third countries travelling within the Community for the purpose of carrying out scientific research;
- representatives of non-profit organisations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organised by non-profit organizations;
- family members of the citizens of the European Union (as well as Switzerland and EFTA countries).
- the procedure only applies to EU citizens who move to or reside in another EU Member State than the one of which they are nationals, and it applies to their family members who accompany or join them. This procedure applies only to family members of EU nationals who do not have Polish citizenship or do not have a permanent residence in Poland
 
(https://www.gov.pl/web/india/visas---general-information) (https://www.gov.pl/web/india/visas---general-information)

## Documents Required
Documents checklist
Important update for applicants applying for a Schengen visa.
Applicants who apply for a Schengen visa must visit the respective Visa Application Center in person and submit visa 
application by themselves along with biometric data (fingerprints).
Submission of visa application through travel agents is not allowed. At the moment of visa application 
submission, employees of Visa Application Center collect fingerprints from applicants who are 12 years 
old and above. Applicants, who state that they have already provided fingerprints earlier but do not 
have the respective mark “VIS” on previous Schengen visa in their passport, will be obliged to submit
 fingerprints at Visa Application Center.
Please note: Kotak General Insurance has officially changed its name to Zurich Kotak General Insurance Company (India) following the JV agreement sign-off.

## Photo Specifications
Note: We regret we cannot accept  photographs that do not meet these requirements
Please provide one recent photograph  (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, which should not have been used  previously in the passport. The photograph should be in colour and:
- Taken  against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are  distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear  share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed  on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full  face, non-smiling [without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless  the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic  background]
- Please  stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note: Please follow these instructions  carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these requirements your  application will be considered incomplete. A photo booth meeting these  requirements is available at the centre.

## Processing Time
Processing time is 15 calendar days and it will start from the submission of the application at the Embassy/ Consulate.
In some cases, the processing time may be prolonged to 45 days.

Kindly note if application is submitted in Satellite centre, it may take up to 48-72 hours in transit to New Delhi/Mumbai. All the applications received from Satellite centers will be sent to Embassy/Consulate on next working day.

## Application Form
Note - The applicant has to carry the downloaded filled form while visiting the centre for submission as a mandatory requirement. Applicants can either log in to complete the form online or download the PDF and fill it digitally.
Schengen Visa Form - Online (https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login)
Schengen Visa Form 
Sample Schengen Visa Form
IMPORTANT NOTE: You are requested to fill-up your online visa application form maximum 5 days prior to your scheduled appointment.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
General Information:
VISA type-D can be provided for people who are planning to stay  on the Polish territory more than 90 days in total (one or more visits) during  a year starting from the day of the first entry.
Long-term VISA type-D gives a right:
- to       stay on the Polish territory till the expiration date of VISA;
- to move on the territory  of the other countries-members of the Schengen Agreement not more than 90 days  during every 180-day period starting from the day of the first entry.
- important information-
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
General Information:
VISA type-D can be provided for people who are planning to stay  on the Polish territory more than 90 days in total (one or more visits) during  a year starting from the day of the first entry.
Long-term VISA type-D gives a right:
- to       stay on the Polish territory till the expiration date of VISA;
- to move on the territory  of the other countries-members of the Schengen Agreement not more than 90 days  during every 180-day period starting from the day of the first entry.

visa_types.name: NATIONAL VISA
visa_types.overview:
Long term visa for a stay over 90 and up to 365 days in the Republic of Poland. Please note that the national visa allows to stay in other Schengen countries for up to 90 days within the period of 180 days.
- Study
- PHD and Researchers
- Employment
- Vocational Training
- Others
- TRC Collection
visa_types.full_text:
Long term visa for a stay over 90 and up to 365 days in the Republic of Poland. Please note that the national visa allows to stay in other Schengen countries for up to 90 days within the period of 180 days.
- Study
- PHD and Researchers
- Employment
- Vocational Training
- Others
- TRC Collection

visa_types.name: SCHENGEN-VISA
visa_types.overview:
If you are planning a short visit to the Republic of Poland and you do not have Polish nationality, you may need to apply for a Schengen visa. The Republic of Poland is one of the 29 European countries forming the Schengen Area which have no border controls between them. These countries also issue a common visa, the Schengen visa.
For more information on Schengen visa for foreigners, click here (https://www.gov.pl/web/udsc-en/schengen-information-system).
Common Information Sheet for Schengen Visa Applicants in India
- Business Visit
- Tourist Visit
- Other
visa_types.full_text:
If you are planning a short visit to the Republic of Poland and you do not have Polish nationality, you may need to apply for a Schengen visa. The Republic of Poland is one of the 29 European countries forming the Schengen Area which have no border controls between them. These countries also issue a common visa, the Schengen visa.
For more information on Schengen visa for foreigners, click here (https://www.gov.pl/web/udsc-en/schengen-information-system).
Common Information Sheet for Schengen Visa Applicants in India
- Business Visit
- Tourist Visit
- Other

visa_types.overview:
Overview
General Information:
VISA type-D can be provided for people who are planning to stay on the Polish territory more than 90 days in total (one or more visits) during a year starting from the day of the first entry.
Long-term VISA type-D gives a right:
- to stay on the Polish territory till the expiration date of VISA;
- to move on the territory  of the other countries-members of the Schengen Agreement not more than 90 days  during every 180-day period starting from the day of the first entry.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
General Information:
VISA type-D can be provided for people who are planning to stay on the Polish territory more than 90 days in total (one or more visits) during a year starting from the day of the first entry.
Long-term VISA type-D gives a right:
- to stay on the Polish territory till the expiration date of VISA;
- to move on the territory  of the other countries-members of the Schengen Agreement not more than 90 days  during every 180-day period starting from the day of the first entry.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Study]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee can be paid in cash or card.
VFS Service charge:
Along with the visa fees, there is a service charge of INR 1026/- (All VFS’s service charges are inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @ 9% and CGST@ 9%)) is applicable per visa application and is mandatory to make payment online at the time of booking appointment. For Appeal cases, service charge is applicable.
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in Indian Rupees is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The Visa fee is non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
- The service fee is non-refundable once the appointment is confirmed.
- Applicants will be eligible for rescheduling their confirmed appointment once to another date if slots are available online.
- There is an optional courier facility available at Rs. 960/- (Inclusive of Goods and Service Tax –SGST @9% and CGST@9%) per application / passport.
- Courier after submission - INR 960
- (Description- If you had not opted for the Courier service on the day of your application submission, you could still choose this service after the submission. Simply send an email to our Customer Care team at vasinfo@vfshelpline.com (mailto:vasinfo@vfshelpline.com) and pay the required fees online.)
- Please note: Emails will be responded to Monday through Friday during business hours and the payment link will remain valid for 24 hours for payment initiation.

## Documents Required
Checklist D Others
Checklist for Dependent Visa

## Photo Specifications
Note: We  regret we cannot accept photographs that do not meet these requirements
Please provide one recent photograph (not more than 6 months  old) of yourself, which should not have been used previously in the passport.  The photograph should be in colour and:
- Taken against a light  background (white or off-white) so that features are distinguishable and  contrast against the background.
- Clear share quality and  with the face in focus.
- Printed on normal  photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling  [without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the applicant  wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background]
- Please stick the  Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note: Please  follow these instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these  requirements your application will be considered incomplete. A photo booth  meeting these requirements is available at the centre.

## Processing Time
Processing time is 15 calendar days and it will start from the submission of the application at the Embassy/ Consulate.
In some cases, the processing time may be prolonged to 45 days.
Kindly note if application is submitted in Satellite centre, it may take up to 48-72 hours in transit to New Delhi/Mumbai. All the applications received from Satellite centers will be sent to Embassy/Consulate on next working day.

## Application Form
National Visa Form (https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login) 

The applicant has to carry the downloaded filled form while visiting the centre for submission as a mandatory requirement. 
IMPORTANT NOTE: You are requested to fill-up your online visa application form maximum 5 days prior to your scheduled appointment.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
General Information:
VISA type-D can be provided for people who are planning to stay  on the Polish territory for more than 90 days in total (one or more visits)  during a year starting from the day of the first entry.
Long-term VISA type-D gives a right:
- to  stay on the Polish territory till the expiration date of VISA;
- to move on the territory  of the other countries-members of the Schengen Agreement not more than 90 days  during every 180-day period starting from the day of the first entry.
- important information-
For the new requirements to apply in National Study, please refer to the below link on the website of Poland Embassy:
https://www.gov.pl/web/india/new-requirements-for-study-visa-form-1-july-2025 (https://www.gov.pl/web/india/new-requirements-for-study-visa-form-1-july-2025)
All applicants applying for National Employment and study, would receive their appointment confirmation from the Embassy after following the process as listed on their official website (D-Type national visa - work - Poland in India - Gov.pl website (https://www.gov.pl/web/india/d-type-national-visa---work) and D-Type national visa - study - Poland in India - Gov.pl website (https://www.gov.pl/web/india/d-type-national-visa---study2)) 
Once the applicants receive confirmation of their slot allocation by The Embassy, all these applicants are required to fill up a visa application form (E-form) as a part of submission process. This is a mandatory document and needs to be filled up before visiting the visa application centre in VFS. Please visit the below official portal of VFS to fill up the form here: https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login (https://eforms.vfsglobal.com/pol/en/login)
